## Description

Brief description of what this PR does and why.

## Type of Change

- [ ] Bug fix
- [ ] New feature
- [ ] New tool manifest
- [ ] Breaking change
- [ ] Documentation update
- [ ] CI/infrastructure

## Testing

How was this tested? List relevant tests or manual verification steps.

## Checklist

- [ ] Tests added/updated for the change
- [ ] `npm run lint` passes
- [ ] `npm run typecheck` passes
- [ ] `npm test` passes
- [ ] `npm run build` succeeds
- [ ] CONTRIBUTING.md guidelines followed
